infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Emergency Connect needs your location to show nearby emergencies and share your location with responders.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Emergency Connect needs your location in the background to notify you of nearby emergencies.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Emergency Connect needs photo library access for profile pictures.
